markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 5. OCCUPATIONAL LICENSING AND BUSINESS REGULATIONS [11100 - 12217]
### Chapter 4. Manufacturers, Transporters, Dealers, and Salesmen [11700 - 11909]
#### Article 1.1. Consumer Automotive Recall Safety Act [11750 - 11762]
##### § 11755

Notwithstanding Sections 1633.3 of the Civil Code and Section 9975 of this code, a new motor vehicle dealer may receive electronic authorization from consumers consistent with regulations adopted by the Bureau of Automotive Repair for any repair of a manufacturer recall.

*(Added by Stats. 2019, Ch. 490, Sec. 2. (AB 596) Effective January 1, 2020.)*

subsections.text: Notwithstanding Sections 1633.3 of the Civil Code and Section 9975 of this code, a new motor vehicle dealer may receive electronic authorization from consumers consistent with regulations adopted by the Bureau of Automotive Repair for any repair of a manufacturer recall.
